value.content:
Substate: researching.

You are in the researching substate of Ideation. The framing was shaped in the discussion substate; researcher-style investigation now grounds the approach in evidence before the PI agents ideate against it. Use the session's research/ directory for any artifacts the investigation produces. Research can loop back into discussion when findings reshape the question, and discussion can loop back into research when refinement exposes a new unknown. Exit the researching substate when the investigation has produced enough evidence that the PI stances can each take a concrete stance on the problem.
